instructions: 无论用户提问语言，所有输出必须使用简体中文。代码部分保留英文语法，但注释、说明、思考过程必须用中文。

build.prompt: 始终以中文（简体，zh-CN）与用户交流。用中文进行回答。

update.template:
Please analyze this codebase and update the AGENTS.md file containing:
1. Build/lint/test commands - especially for running a single test
2. Code style guidelines including imports, formatting, types, naming conventions, error handling, etc.
The file will be given to agentic coding agents (such as yourself) that operate in this repository. Make it about 150 lines long.
